summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
WeJam is a live music experience in Camden, London, where groups of up to 8 play real instruments together in a guided 90-minute session. No musical experience is needed — a colour-coded system on tablet screens shows each player which notes to play, so even complete beginners sound great from the first song. Choose from over 75 classic pop and rock tracks including Mr. Brightside, Don't Stop Me Now, and Smells Like Teen Spirit. Sessions are led by a professional musician, and every group receives recordings of their performance. Perfect for birthday parties, team building, hen dos, family days out, and date nights.
